description.unified: Throws a spear at the farthest enemy, dealing Physical DMG, pulling them in front of you. Then deals Physical DMG to enemies within range and stuns them for [3 sec->1 sec].
For [7 sec->5sec], increases own P.Block Chance by [200->400]. On Block, deals P.DMG to nearby enemies and reduces their ATK by [25%->22%].

For 5sec, increases all allies’ P.Block Chance by [400 (added)] and prepares to leap. While preparing, becomes immune to CC. On Block, increases the leap attack’s DMG by [7%->8%] and deals P.DMG to the attacker. When preparation ends, leaps to the nearest enemy, dealing P.DMG and stuns them for [2.5 sec->1 sec].
Increases all allies’ P.DEF by and P.Block Chance by [250->120].

IV.unified: Increases the duration of stun by [1.2 sec->0.5 sec].

dark.unified: On cast, increases all allies’ Physical Defense by [24%->15%].
On cast, increases all allies’ Physical DMG reduction by [30% (added)] for 5 sec.

light.unified: Physical Defense increase amount increases by [30%->50%].

description.unified: [Will to Win] increases P.Block chance by [100->400] and raises the target's P.DMG taken by {0}% for 5 sec.
[Steel Fortress] increases DMG Boost on Block by [50%->24%] and extends the Stun duration of Leap Attack by {0} sec.
[Spearhead] recovers 40% of P.DEF every sec when blocking, and increases P.DEF gained by {0}% for 5 sec. P.DEF Boost can stack up to [{4} (added)] times.

dark.unified: At the start of each battle, reduces all enemies’ Attack by [25%->15%] for 6 sec. This effect cannot be dispelled.

description.unified: Increases all allies' P.DEF by {0}%. On Block, has a {1}% chance to recover {2} Mana and reduce the cooldown of all Skills by 1 sec.
